name: Golden Pen
description:
Pen that makes anything you write with it real.

P.S. I replaced it with the cheating wife one as I don't like it, but I try to give the cheating one a shot. But you guys don't like it either, and I hope this one makes up for it.

And have a wonderful day or night in your life, and peace out ✌️
creator: GoldenFredbear
